# Pull Request

## Summary
Briefly describe the purpose and context of this change.

## Changes
- List the main changes introduced.

## Testing
Describe how you tested these changes (e.g., unit tests, integration tests, manual steps, commands).

## Screenshots (Optional)
Add before/after screenshots if applicable (e.g., for UI changes or new output formats).

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new/changed functionality.
- [ ] Documentation updated (if necessary).
- [ ] Linked to related issues or tasks.
- [ ] Code follows project conventions and style guidelines.
